title: Plug Power's Revenue Growth is Accelerating. Is it Time to Buy the Hydrogen Stock?
text: Plug Power is demonstrating accelerating revenue growth with Q1 2026 showing 22% year-over-year expansion. The company is achieving significant margin improvements through Project Quantum Leap cost-reduction initiatives. Electrolyzer segment revenue surged from $9.2 million to $40.8 million year-over-year, indicating a 343% growth rate in this critical business segment. Demand remains strong from core customers like Amazon and Walmart in the material handling space. The company expects full-year 2026 revenue growth of 13%-15%, with Q2 anticipated to be similar to Q1 in revenue. Management targets achieving positive EBITDAS by Q4 2026, with positive operating income by 2027 and full profitability by 2028. The combination of accelerating revenue growth and improving unit economics represents a meaningful inflection point in the company's turnaround narrative.
